x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR Performance Analytics job configurations (pa_job_config) drive the collection of worker productivity metrics that Now Assist HRSD uses for AI-driven workload balancing and capacity recommendations. Without active PA jobs collecting HR metrics, AI workload optimization is not possible.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure Performance Analytics collection jobs for HR metrics via pa_job_config_list.do. Track cases per agent, average resolution time, and queue depth. Target: 2+ active HR PA job configurations. Now Assist HRSD uses these metrics for AI-driven workload balancing.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c8a
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[HR Performance Analytics job configurations (pa_job_config) drive the collection of worker productivity metrics that Now Assist HRSD uses for AI-driven workload balancing and capacity recommendations. Without active PA jobs collecting HR metrics, AI workload optimization is not possible.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>HR Case Worker Productivity Metrics</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    if (!gs.tableExists('pa_job_config')) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'pa_job_config not found', finding: 'Performance Analytics job configuration table not found. PA productivity metrics check is not applicable.' };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('pa_job_config');
    ga.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', 'HR');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + ' active HR PA job configurations';
    if (count >= 2) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + ' active HR PA job configurations. Worker productivity data is being collected — Now Assist HRSD can use workload data for AI-driven assignment optimization.' };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue, finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active HR PA job configuration(s) (target: 2+). Limited productivity data collection — Now Assist HRSD workload optimization will have partial coverage.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue, finding: 'No active HR PA job configurations found. Now Assist HRSD uses worker productivity metrics for AI-driven workload balancing — without data collection AI cannot optimize HR agent assignments.' };
    }
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>HRSD</module>
<number>CHK0006037</number>
<order>200</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure Performance Analytics collection jobs for HR metrics via pa_job_config_list.do. Track cases per agent, average resolution time, and queue depth. Target: 2+ active HR PA job configurations. Now Assist HRSD uses these metrics for AI-driven workload balancing.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c8a</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
